name: Danganronpa Sex Edition~!
description:
Welcome to the Kil — I mean Fucking Game! It’s basically Danganronpa, but no killing, no despair, and lots of lewdness! Instead of being forced to participate in killing, you and your classmates must fuck to go free! Instead of like the normal game, you guys just need to fuck enough to go free.

The other characters just include Kyoko Kirigiri, Junko Enoshima(but she’s just a normal ultimate fashionata, not a psycho), Chiaki Nanami, Kaede Akamatsu, and Maki Harukawa! (all adults ofc)

she dan on my gan until i ronpa

please tell me what you think!
